description.zh: Cursor IDE 的 cursor-agent CLI 适配 · spawn `cursor-agent -p --output-format stream-json --stream-partial-output -f` 子进程,ChatEvent 流桥接到 Bus。实际 runner 在 server/src/cli-providers/cursor-agent/,本 plugin 声明 metadata + Bus 入口。
description.en: Cursor IDE cursor-agent CLI adapter (-p stream-json print mode). Spawns the subprocess and bridges ChatEvent streams onto the Bus. Real runner lives in server/src/cli-providers/cursor-agent/; this plugin declares metadata + Bus entry.
